experiences.description: Lead the development and delivery of banking and payment products, spanning backend microservices, REST APIs, and high-volume transactional systems (5M+ daily). Acted as Tech Lead for 4+ products, contributing to architectural decisions and mentoring the team.

Developed and maintained financial products using .NET, C#, and Angular. Applied Clean Architecture and SOLID principles in a regulated banking environment, focusing on domain-driven development and pyramid testing (unit, integration, and E2E).

Developed and maintained business-applications using C#, ASP.NET, and Delphi. Focused on factory floor systems with high availability requirements and strong dependency on relational databases like Oracle, SQL Server, and Firebird.
